title: AI-Powered Job Hunting Agent
description: Architected an automated multi-agent pipeline using Python and Gemini 2.5 Flash API to search, filter, and score jobs.
Integrated Semantic Search using sentence-transformers to calculate ATS keyword matches against job descriptions.
Automated personalized resume and cover letter generation using Jinja2 and WeasyPrint PDF engines.
Developed a real-time Telegram notifier and automated workflow via GitHub Actions, reducing manual job hunting time by 95%.

title: GenAI-Enabled Mobile Assistant
description: Created an Android application using Flutter and Dart that integrates Gemini LLM for dynamic context-aware assistant features.
Developed custom vector search client on-device using local ChromaDB wrappers for fast retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).
Achieved fluid UI animations and custom themes, leveraging modern Flutter state management (Bloc/Cubit) and clean architecture.

title: Deep Learning Object Detection System
description: Trained and evaluated a YOLOv8 model in PyTorch on a custom dataset of 10k images for industrial quality inspection.
Integrated the detection model with an API endpoint built using FastAPI and containerized the setup using Docker for easy deployment.
Optimized pipeline to run at 30+ FPS on standard CPU hardware using ONNX Runtime optimizations.

title: Portfolio Website with Local RAG Chatbot
description: Built a modern responsive portfolio website using React, TailwindCSS, and FastAPI.
Embedded an interactive chatbot powered by a localized LLM with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to answer questions about my skills and experience.
Deployed the backend service serverless on Vercel and optimized database lookups using Supabase pgvector.
